citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Images are encoded as 2D arrays of pixels, where each pixel is a number indicating the brightness of that piece of the image, or an RGB value indicating the brightness of the red, green, and blue components of that piece.
